subject: english
description: 関係代名詞 who / which / that を使って、名詞を主語として説明します。

questions.question: I have a friend ___ speaks English. (人・主格)
questions.explanation: 人が主語の場合は who を使います

questions.question: I have a book ___ is very interesting. (物・主格)
questions.explanation: 物が主語の場合は which を使います

questions.question: I have a friend ___ lives in Tokyo. (人・主格)
questions.explanation: 人・物どちらでも that を使えます

questions.question: I have a cat ___ is very cute. (物・主格)
questions.explanation: 物が主語の場合は which を使います

questions.question: The boy ___ is playing there is my brother. (人・主格)
questions.explanation: 人が主語の場合は who を使います

questions.question: The car ___ is parked there is mine. (物・主格)
questions.explanation: 物が主語の場合は which を使います

questions.question: I know a teacher ___ teaches English. (人・主格)
questions.explanation: 人が主語の場合は who を使います

questions.question: This is a dog ___ can swim. (物・主格)
questions.explanation: 物が主語の場合は that を使えます
